examples: Pellagra is a disease that results from niacin deficiency.
Maize contains the vitamin niacin, but not in a form the body can absorb.
Niacin is one of the most stable of the B-vitamins.
The same could be said for the combination of niacin and a flush blocker in Cordaptive.
After all, niacin is a vitamin and had been used in millions of people.
